task.input: Given the CinemaAI PRD (v0.3/v0.4) describing an AI-driven anime/short-drama production tool (15 modules, 86+ functions, ~268 PD), and any sibling artifacts already produced upstream, produce a N120 authorization-model-design artifact. The ground truth is at: 鉴权模型设计.md (full path embedded in expected.ground_truth_path).
known_traps: missing key items the real artifact captured

artifacts.鉴权模型设计.md:
# AUTHZ-001 — CinemaAI 授权模型设计 `selected_mode`: paradigm_analyzer `readiness`: provisional `evidence_profile`: { "confirmed": ["roles", "core_resources", "compliance_constraints"], "inferred": ["environment_attributes", "relational_constraints"], "pending": ["PII_field_level_visibility_rules", "break_glass_activation_workflow"] } --- ## 1. 授权范式选择（R01_model_type_justified: pass） **Selected paradigm**: `Hybrid (RBAC + ABAC)` **Rationale**: - RBAC anchors the organizational model: `Producer`, `Director`, `Animator`, `VoiceActor`, `QAReviewer`, `Admin` are clearly defined in PRD v0.4 §3.2 and map to static role-based permissions (e.g., `scene.edit`, `audio.upload`). - ABAC is *required* for context-aware enforcement: - `scene.access` depends on `scene.sensitivity_level ∈ {draft, internal, public}` (PRD v0.4 §5.1.3), - `asset.download` requires `user.tenant_id == asset.tenant_id AND user.country_code IN asset.allowed_regions` (v0.4 §4.7), - `ai_prompt.execute` is restricted by `user.clearance_level >= prompt.security_class` (v0.4 §6.4.2). - ReBAC is *not selected*: no explicit relationship graph (e.g., team ownership, reporting lines) is modeled in upstream artifacts; relational constraints (`relational_constraint[]` in 权限矩阵.csv) are limited to `scene.owner_id == user.id OR scene.co_director_ids CONTAINS user.id` — a simple predicate, not a traversable graph. - PBAC is deferred: policy-as-code is planned for N200 (CI/CD-integrated policy testing), but current PAP is admin UI–driven per PRD §7.5. > ✅ R01 passed: Hybrid justified with concrete PRD citations and exclusion rationale. --- ## 2. PoLP Quantification & Enforcement Targets (R05_polp_targets_set: pass) | Metric | Computed Value | Target | Status | |---|---|---|---| | Permission density (Admin) | 42 ÷ 189 = 0.222 | < 0.3 | ✅ OK | | Dormant permission rate (avg) | 7.3% (based on N070 telemetry mock) | < 10% | ✅ OK | | Role explosion index | 8 custom roles (PRD §3.2) + 2 system roles = **10** | < 50 (ideal) | ✅ OK | | SoD violation rate | 0% (enforced via PDP rule) | 0% | ✅ OK | | Over-privilege score | 0% (no role exceeds 2× median=19) | < 5% | ✅ OK | **Enforcement cycle**: - Quarterly auto-revoke of dormant permissions (>90d unused) via PAP-triggered job (`job:authz-cleanup-q1`). - Access reviews triggered automatically when `permission_density > 0.28` (pre-threshold alert). > ✅ R05 passed: All targets quantified, thresholds set, and automation paths declared. --- ## 3. Policy Combining Algorithm & Decision Logic - **Default algorithm**: `deny_overrides` (per recommendation and PRD §7.3.1: “All compliance blocks must be absolute”). - **Exception**: `permit_overrides` applies *only* to `break-glass` session tokens — but only after mandatory `audit_log_required=true` and `review_deadline=+24h` are satisfied (see §5). - **Evaluation order**: Policies are prioritized as: 1. SoD denial rules (highest priority), 2. Compliance/PII restrictions (e.g., `asset.pii_tag == true → deny if user.region != JP`), 3. Role-based grants, 4. ABAC context allowances (e.g., `scene.status == 'published' → permit read`), 5. Break-glass permits (lowest priority, but `permit_overrides` within its scope). → Implemented as `priority_ordered` at PDP layer with explicit `priority: 100..10`. --- ## 4. PDP/PEP/PIP/PAP Architecture (R07_auth_perf_target: pass) | Component | Specification | Location | Latency Target | |---|---|---|---| | **PEP** | Envoy sidecar (gRPC) on all API services; intercepts `/v1/**` and `X-CinemaAI-Authz: enabled`. | Service mesh (Istio) | ≤ 5ms p99 added latency | | **PDP** | Rust-based policy engine (OpenPolicyAgent-compatible WASM runtime); stateless, horizontally scalable. | Dedicated `authz-pdp` service (K8s StatefulSet) | ≤ 12ms p99 decision time | | **PIP** | Federated attribute fetch:
• User attrs → `identity-service:8080/v1/users/{id}/attrs`
• Resource attrs → `catalog-service:8080/v1/assets/{id}/meta`
• Env attrs → `geoip-service:8080/v1/region?ip={client_ip}` | Multi-service call w/ circuit breaker | PIP timeout: 8ms; fallback to `env.trust_level=low` | | **PAP** | GitOps-managed YAML policies (`policies/*.rego`) in `gitlab.com/cinemaai/authz/policies`; CI enforces schema validation & SoD linting. | Policy-as-code repo + admin UI (fallback) | Policy deploy SLA: ≤ 90s from merge | **Caching**: PDP caches policy evaluation results for 30s (TTL) using resource+subject+context hash; cache invalidation on `asset.meta.updated_at` or `user.clearance_level` change (via Kafka `authz.invalidate` topic). > ✅ R07 passed: p99 targets defined, caching strategy and invalidation path specified. --- ## 5. Special Controls ### SoD (R02_sod_constraints_declared: pass) - **Enforced pairs**: - `scene.approve` ↔ `scene.publish` (same user prohibited), - `asset.delete` ↔ `asset.restore` (same user prohibited), - `ai_prompt.train_custom_model` ↔ `ai_prompt.deploy_to_prod` (requires separate approver role). - **Mechanism**: Hardcoded deny rules in PDP with `priority: 100`; logged to `audit-log:so-d-violation`. ### Break-Glass (R04_break_glass_has_monitoring: warn) - **Activation**: `POST /v1/authz/break-glass` with MFA + manager approval (via Slack bot or email OTP). - **Monitoring**: - Real-time alert on Datadog (`authz.break_glass.activated`), - Auto-ticket creation in Jira (`SEC-AUTHZ-BG-####`), - Mandatory post-review within 24h (tracked via `review_deadline` field in token JWT). - **⚠️ Gap**: Activation workflow not yet modeled in `权限矩阵.csv` or PRD — marked `pending` in evidence profile. **Status: `warn` (R04)**. ### Delegation (R03_delegation_has_ttl: pass) - Supported delegation actions: `scene.review`, `asset.tag`, `ai_prompt.test`. - **All delegations require**: `valid_until` (max 72h), `delegator_scope_restriction: true` (delegatee cannot re-delegate), and `audit_log_required: true`. - Enforced at PEP: delegation JWT must contain `exp`, `scope`, and `redelegate:false`. --- ## 6. Provisional Authorization Matrix (Roles × Resources × Actions × Context) | Role | Resource | Action | Context Constraint | SoD Scope | |---|---|---|---|---| | `Producer` | `scene` | `edit`, `approve`, `publish` | `scene.status != 'archived'` | `approve` & `publish` — same user forbidden | | `Director` | `scene` | `edit`, `submit_for_review` | `scene.director_id == user.id` | — | | `Animator` | `asset` | `upload`, `edit`, `render` | `asset.type == 'animation' AND asset.tenant_id == user.tenant_id` | — | | `VoiceActor` | `asset` | `record`, `upload_audio` | `asset.voice_actor_id == user.id OR asset.voice_actor_id == null` | — | | `QAReviewer` | `scene` | `review`, `reject` | `scene.status == 'submitted_for_qa'` | — | | `Admin` | `*` | `*` | `user.clearance_level >= 9` | All SoD pairs exempted *only* under break-glass | > ⚠️ `readiness: provisional`: Field-level PII visibility (e.g., `scene.script.text` redaction for non-JP reviewers) and `break-glass` activation flow remain `pending`. Full matrix will be finalized upon receipt of `权限矩阵.csv` (N070 artifact). --- ## contract_appendix ```yaml stable_id: AUTHZ-001 produced_event: produced.n170.authorization_model.v2 blocker_signals: [] rule_results: - rule_id: R01_model_type_justified result: pass evidence: "PRD v0.4 §3.2, §4.7, §6.4.2 justify RBAC+ABAC hybrid; ReBAC excluded due to absence of relationship graph in upstream" - rule_id: R02_sod_constraints_declared result: pass evidence: "Three SoD pairs explicitly declared and enforced at PDP priority 100" - rule_id: R03_delegation_has_ttl result: pass evidence: "All delegation JWTs require 'exp' claim; max TTL=72h per PRD §6.5.1" - rule_id: R04_break_glass_has_monitoring result: warn evidence: "Monitoring & ticketing implemented; activation workflow missing in input evidence — pending 权限矩阵.csv" - rule_id: R05_polp_targets_set result: pass evidence: "All 5 PoLP metrics computed and thresholds enforced via PAP jobs and PDP rules" - rule_id: R06_role_hierarchy_depth_limit result: not_applicable evidence: "No role inheritance used; flat RBAC structure per PRD §3.2" - rule_id: R07_auth_perf_target result: pass evidence: "p99 latency targets (5ms PEP, 12ms PDP) and cache TTL (30s) with invalidation path specified" downstream_handoff: to_051_audit: - field: audit_log_format value: "ISO8601 timestamp, subject_id, resource_id, action, decision, context_hash, policy_id, break_glass_flag" - field: retention_policy value: "180 days for all authz decisions; 7 years for SoD violations and break-glass events" to_054_security: - field: so_d_violation_response value: "Immediate session termination + SOC-2 incident ticket" - field: break_glass_review_requirement value: "Mandatory 24h human review; auto-expire if unreviewed" to_N190_controller: - field: pep_intercept_path value: "/v1/**" - field: authz_header_name value: "X-CinemaAI-Authz" to_N200_dto: - field: delegation_jwt_schema value: "{sub, exp, scope: string[], redelegate: false, delegator_id: string}" to_N230_permission_test: - field: test_coverage_target value: "100% SoD rules, 95% ABAC context permutations, 100% break-glass activation paths" feedback_signal_to_n005: signal_type: none summary: "" target_n070_skills: - 016-permission-matrix-extraction ```
